items.title: Minkowski p controls neighbor geometry
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  query(("query q")) --> p1["p=1 Manhattan"]
  query --> p2["p=2 Euclidean"]
  query --> pInf["p large: max-gap"]
  p1 --> n1(("axis-aligned neighbors"))
  p2 --> n2(("radial neighbors"))
  pInf --> n3(("single-dim dominated"))
items.caption: The same query point can have different nearest neighbors under different Minkowski exponents p because each p defines a different notion of closeness.

items.title: Cosine vs Euclidean on scaled vectors
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  origin(("0")) --> a(("v: short doc"))
  origin --> b(("2v: long doc"))
  origin --> c(("w: different topic"))
  a -.->|"cosine: same direction"| b
  a -->|"L2: farther from b than c?"| c
items.caption: Parallel embeddings (v and 2v) score as identical under cosine but differ in L2 length; a third vector w may be closer in L2 while less aligned in direction.
